---
id: regenerate-artist-ai
title: "Regenerate AI metadata for artist"
description: "Triggers AI regeneration of the artist's biography and metadata. Returns an HTML fragment with the updated content."

hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api:

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Regenerate AI metadata for artist"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/library/artist/{id}/regenerate-ai"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Triggers AI regeneration of the artist's biography and metadata. Returns an HTML fragment with the updated content.

  as={"h2"}
